# ActionPotential.AI

ActionPotential.AI is a behavioral AI marketing and automation agency.

## Core Value Proposition

ActionPotential.AI helps service businesses:
- acquire more qualified leads
- convert more opportunities into booked appointments
- automate follow-up and customer communication
- increase retention, referrals, and lifetime value

## Primary Services

1. Omnichannel Visibility (SEO, AEO, AI-Engine Optimization, Google Ads, Meta Ads)
2. Conversational Marketing (Website Chat, SMS, Messenger, Instagram DMs, WhatsApp, Voice)
3. AI Agent Suite deployment for core growth workflows
4. Marketing Automation (speed-to-lead, nurture sequences, appointment automation, reputation)
5. AI Visibility Services (LLM visibility monitoring, authority building, crawler optimization)
6. SEO and Paid Media execution

## Ideal Clients

Small and midsize service businesses, including healthcare, consulting, legal, real estate, hospitality, and home services.

## Brand Principles

- Human-centered AI
- Behavioral science-led decision design
- Full-funnel ownership
- No long-term contracts

## Founder

Cary Sears, Founder & CEO:
- Master's in Experimental Psychology
- Master's in User Experience Design
- Neuropsychological testing experience at Cleveland Clinic
- Leadership in digital health and growth experience at Noom

## Official Website

https://actionpotential.ai/

## Contact

hello@actionpotential.ai

## Primary Service Areas

- Westchester County, New York
- New York City
- Nationwide (United States)
